name: io.github.mishrasanjeev/agenticorg
description: 50+ AI agents, 1000+ integrations, voice, RAG, LLM routing. Finance/HR/Marketing/Ops.

tools.name: list_agents
tools.description: List 50+ AI agents across Finance, HR, Marketing, Ops — filter by domain, status, type

tools.name: run_agent
tools.description: Execute any AI agent (ap_processor, payroll_engine, campaign_pilot, support_triage, etc.) with real tool calls

tools.name: get_agent_details
tools.description: Get agent config, scopes, tools, confidence floor, HITL conditions, shadow status

tools.name: create_agent
tools.description: Create a new AI agent from natural language description or manual config

tools.name: create_agent_from_sop
tools.description: Parse an SOP/policy document (PDF/Word) and auto-generate an AI agent

tools.name: list_connectors
tools.description: List 54 native connectors + 1000+ via Composio (SAP, Oracle, Jira, HubSpot, Salesforce, GSTN, Tally, Stripe, Gmail, Slack, Teams)

tools.name: call_connector_tool
tools.description: Call any of 340+ connector tools — create Jira tickets, send emails, query CRM, file GST returns, process payments

tools.name: list_workflows
tools.description: List 20+ workflow templates — invoice_to_pay, month_end_close, campaign_launch, incident_response

tools.name: run_workflow
tools.description: Trigger a multi-step workflow with parallel agents, HITL approval gates, and adaptive replanning

tools.name: search_knowledge_base
tools.description: Search company documents (PDF, Word, Excel) via RAG — agents answer from your uploaded policies and SOPs

tools.name: list_mcp_tools
tools.description: Discover all available MCP tools across 54 native connectors and 1000+ Composio integrations

tools.name: get_agent_card
tools.description: Get the A2A protocol Agent Card for cross-platform agent discovery

environmentVariables.name: AGENTICORG_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key from your AgenticOrg dashboard (Settings > API Keys). Start free at agenticorg.ai

environmentVariables.name: AGENTICORG_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Custom API base URL (default: https://app.agenticorg.ai). Set for self-hosted deployments.
